plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet mandate limits.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETF risk.
Increase QQQI to 25% for income and broad index stability.
Trim QQQ to 10% to rebalance broad index exposure.
Initiate a new position in AAPL at 5% for quality growth.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and reduces overall portfolio risk.
conservative.read: This conservative plan aims for a modest ~1.5%/month outlook by significantly reducing leverage and concentration. Expect lower drawdowns but also limited upside potential due to reduced risk exposure.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to address concentration and comply with mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to reduce leveraged ETF exposure.
Trim QQQI to 10% to rebalance the portfolio's income component.
Initiate a new position in AVGO at 8% for quality tech exposure.
Initiate a new position in AAPL at 7% for quality tech exposure.
This plan balances growth with risk management, maintaining a diversified approach.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets ~2.5%/month by reducing leverage and diversifying into quality tech. It aims for moderate growth with a controlled risk profile, keeping drawdowns manageable.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell all QQQI to reallocate capital towards higher growth opportunities.
Trim QQQ to 10% to free up capital for aggressive setups.
Add to SOXL, increasing exposure to leveraged semiconductors to 8%.
Initiate new positions in LEU, GUSH, and AVGO, leveraging high-scoring scanner setups.
This plan leans into high-conviction setups and calculated leverage for aggressive growth.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan aims for ~4%/month by leveraging high-scoring setups and increasing exposure to leveraged ETFs. Be aware of significantly higher potential drawdowns and the daily decay/rebalancing effects of leveraged products, requiring strict stop discipline.

plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet mandate limits.
Increase QQQI to 35% to significantly boost income generation.
Sell all QQQ, SMH, and CRWD to reduce growth-oriented and high-beta exposure.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate all leveraged ETF risk.
This plan focuses on maximizing steady income distributions while minimizing volatility.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1%/month by rotating heavily into income-generating ETFs and broad index funds. While prioritizing low drawdown and reliable distributions, remember that distributions are variable and NAV can still decline in market downturns.
